summary: Completed e2e testing of new admin panel features: Content Editor with Live Preview toggle and UI Management with Display Mode selector, Image Gallery, and active selection. All features working correctly.

issues: ESLint warning: useEffect has missing dependency 'fetchImages' - minor code quality issue

critical_code_review_comments: UIManagementPage.jsx line 234: useEffect has missing dependency 'fetchImages' - consider adding to dependency array or using useCallback
seed_data_creation: None - using existing admin user and default images
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new admin panel features tested and working: 1) Content Editor at /admin/content has Live Preview toggle that shows/hides iframe with actual page preview, 2) UI Management at /admin/ui has Display Mode selector (Individual vs Carousel), Image Gallery with click-to-select functionality, Active/In Carousel badges, Add Image button, and Save All Changes. Backend APIs for /api/settings/all-images and /api/settings/all-content working correctly with authentication.

admin_login.details: Login with admin@suitsindia.com / admin123 works correctly

content_editor_live_preview.details: Live Preview toggle switch found and working - shows/hides iframe with actual page preview. Toggle is ON by default.

content_editor_form_editing.details: Form-based editing with 28 input fields for content editing across 9 page tabs (Home, About, Garments, Fabrics, Technology, How It Works, Get Started, Trunk Show, Contact Us)

ui_management_display_mode.details: Display Mode selector with Individual Image and Carousel options. Clicking switches mode and shows appropriate badges.

ui_management_image_gallery.details: Image Gallery with 3 hero images. Click-to-select functionality works - clicking image in Individual mode sets it as active, in Carousel mode adds/removes from carousel.

ui_management_active_badges.details: Active badge shown on selected image in Individual mode. 'In Carousel' badges shown on selected images in Carousel mode.

ui_management_add_image.details: Add Image button and URL input field present for adding new hero images

save_functionality.details: Save All Changes button present on both Content Editor and UI Management pages. API endpoints /api/settings/all-content and /api/settings/all-images working correctly.

api_all_images.details: GET /api/settings/all-images requires auth, returns page configurations with displayMode, hero images, activeHeroIndex, carouselImages. PUT endpoint also working.
